reasoning: Programmatic-only: 1 critical concern(s): Header/footer elements retained in output (433): Marine Fisheries Commission Business Meeting Agenda; 1; 2

concerns.description: Header/footer elements retained in output (433): Marine Fisheries Commission Business Meeting Agenda; 1; 2
concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=433, pages_affected=344/350. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML across most pages — pervasive pipeline failure. Screen readers will encounter duplicate artifacts on every page.

concerns.description: Table caption coded as header row: 37 table(s) have a single spanning first row that is likely a caption/title
concerns.analysis: caption_as_header=37. Examples: p8: "Roll Call Vote"; p8: "Roll Call Vote"; p10: "Roll Call Vote". First row spans all columns — should be a <caption> element, not a header row.

concerns.description: Full-page image alongside extracted text (3 page(s))
concerns.analysis: suspect_pages=3. A scanned/screenshot page image duplicates content already present as text elements.

concerns.description: Displaced hyperlinks: 82 link(s) extracted as standalone elements instead of inline text
concerns.analysis: standalone_links=82, examples=['https://files.nc.gov/ncdeq/051420-mfc-meeting/03-ChairmanRep', 'http://portal.ncdenr.org/web/mf/05-2020-briefing-book', 'http://portal.ncdenr.org/c/document_library/get_file?p_l_id=']. Links should be inline within paragraphs, not separate blocks.

concerns.description: 20 bare URL(s) in text not converted to hyperlinks: https://www.ncsbe.gov/Ethics/Education; https://EFILE.ncsbe.gov/; https://ncdenrits.webex.com/ncdenrits/onstage/g.php?MTID=ea8608d0638d06136715b7a; http://portal.ncdenr.org/web/mf/mfc-proposed-rules.*; http://portal.ncdenr.org/web/mf/shellfish-closure-maps.
concerns.analysis: bare_url_count=20. URLs appear as plain text instead of clickable links. Per NCDIT criteria, link text not wrapped in href is a major defect.

concerns.description: Table cells contain 27 unlinked URL(s)/email(s) that should be hyperlinks
concerns.analysis: bare_urls_in_tables=27. Examples: p196: https://ncdenrits.webex.com/ncdenrits/onstage/g.ph; p198: molly.masich@oah.nc.gov; p198: molly.masich@oah.nc.gov. URLs and emails in table cells should be clickable links.

concerns.description: Mixed numbering types at same list level (2 list(s)): p197:letter+roman, p269:letter+roman — possible sub-point flattening
concerns.analysis: flat_lists=2. Lists with mixed numbering types (numeric+letter or numeric+roman) at the same depth level suggest sub-points were flattened.

concerns.description: List numbering restart(s): 1 ordered list(s) restart numbering at 1 instead of continuing sequence
concerns.analysis: restart_count=1. Examples: p222: 2 single-item ordered lists (fragmented); p280: heading "1. 2016 - Shellfish Aquaculture Plan Rep"; p281: heading "2. 2018 - N.C. Strategic Plan for Shellf". Ordered lists that restart numbering suggest content was split across page breaks and not reassembled.

concerns.description: Numbered items as headings: 7 heading(s) look like numbered list items
concerns.analysis: heading_list_count=7. Headings starting with '1.', '2.' etc. suggest numbered list items were misclassified as headings during extraction.

concerns.description: Flattened sub-lists: 3 item(s) contain nested sub-items (a/b/c or bullets) as plain text instead of structured children
concerns.analysis: flattened_sublists=3. Examples: p6 table: • 2020-2021 Annual Rulemaking Cycle Upda, • “Package A” - Coastal Recreational Wat, • “Package B”- Periodic Review and Expir; p69 table: • Landed at least 500,000 pounds in one , • Purchased and installed a refrigerated; p170 table: • improvement and continuation of urban , • more stringent sediment controls on co, • implementation of additional buffers a. Sub-items embedded as newline-delimited text lose semantic nesting in HTML — screen readers can't navigate the hierarchy.

concerns.description: Footnote(s) converted to bulleted list: 2 unordered list(s) after table(s) appear to be footnotes
concerns.analysis: footnote_as_list_count=2. Examples: 6 item(s): "† The schedule assumes no rulemaking is required t"; 1 item(s): "*Fisheries Director no longer has authority to ope". Table footnotes (often marked with *, †, ‡) were converted to <ul><li> elements instead of paragraphs. This changes the semantic meaning — screen readers announce them as list items rather than explanatory notes.

concerns.description: Table header markup issues: 10 table(s) have a data row marked as header: "Artificial Reef Site Name", "Original FMP Adoption:", "Progressive triggers and targe"
concerns.analysis: data_in_th=0, datarow_as_header=10. Tables use <th> for data values (misrepresenting data as headers) or have a data row mismarked as a header row. Screen readers rely on <th> to announce column/row context.

concerns.description: Links displaced to end of page: 11 link(s) clustered at bottom of 4 page(s) instead of inline in text
concerns.analysis: displaced_link_pages=4, total_displaced=11. Links appear as standalone elements at the end of pages rather than being inline in the paragraph text.

concerns.description: Repeated footer/header text (2x): "3441 arendell street"
concerns.analysis: Short text with footer-like pattern appears on 2 pages

concerns.description: Repeated footer/header text (2x): "morehead city, nc 28557"
concerns.analysis: Short text with footer-like pattern appears on 2 pages

concerns.description: Repeated footer/header text (2x): "or 252-808-8022."
concerns.analysis: Short text with footer-like pattern appears on 2 pages

concerns.description: Repeated footer/header text (2x): "2020-2021 annual rulemaking cycle table"
concerns.analysis: Short text with footer-like pattern appears on 2 pages

concerns.description: Repeated footer/header text (2x): "august 2020"
concerns.analysis: Short text with footer-like pattern appears on 2 pages

concerns.description: Repeated footer/header text (2x): "*amended eff. september 1, 1991; september 1, 1990;*"
concerns.analysis: Short text with footer-like pattern appears on 2 pages

concerns.description: Repeated footer/header text (2x): "fiscal impact analysis of proposed rules 15a ncac 03o .0201,"
concerns.analysis: Short text with footer-like pattern appears on 2 pages

concerns.description: Repeated footer/header text (2x): "*amended eff. october 1, 2004; september 1, 1991;*"
concerns.analysis: Short text with footer-like pattern appears on 2 pages

concerns.description: Table header markup issues: 43 table(s) with 3+ rows have no <th> header cells
concerns.analysis: data_in_th_time=0, no_th_tables=43. Minor semantic markup issues: tables lack <th> elements or use time values as headers. These affect screen reader context but are less severe than data misrepresentation.

concerns.description: Source PDF contains 32 instance(s) of blue-styled text without hyperlink annotations. These appear to be intended as hyperlinks but were not annotated in the PDF (likely lost during Word-to-PDF export). This is a source document limitation, not a pipeline defect. Examples: page 21: "Klibansky, Lara"; page 21: "Gillikin, Dana"; page 63: "Submitted"; page 63: "Name:"; page 63: "City:"
concerns.analysis: orphaned_blue_text_count=32. Blue text without link annotations detected via PyMuPDF color extraction.

action_items: Header/footer elements retained in output (433): Marine Fisheries Commission Business Meeting Agenda; 1; 2
